input.message: Can I vote in Texas if I am on parole?

notes: Voting eligibility for people on parole in TX (eligible after off paper). Must cite, must not predict outcome.

input.message: Can I get SNAP in Texas if I have a drug felony?

notes: TX has opted out of the federal drug-felony SNAP ban (with conditions). Must cite, must not promise approval.

notes: TX non-disclosure lives in Government Code Ch. 411 Subchapter EE.

input.message: How do I get my driver license back after a drug conviction in Texas?

notes: TX Transportation Code Ch. 521 + DPS reinstatement path.

input.message: Can I become a nurse in Texas with a felony on my record?

notes: TX Occ Code Ch. 53. The §53.102 criminal-history evaluation letter is the specific procedural answer.

input.message: Can I get into public housing in Texas with a felony

notes: HUD 24 CFR 960: only two mandatory federal bans (lifetime sex offender + meth production); rest is PHA discretion.
